This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your data.", sections: [{ title: "Information We Collect", content: `

Personal Information

We collect information you provide directly to us, such as:

  • Account information (name, email, company)
  • Payment information (processed securely through our payment providers)
  • Communication preferences
  • Customer support inquiries

Usage Data

We automatically collect certain information when you use our services:

Security Data

We use the information we collect to:

  • Authentication: Verify your identity and secure your account

  • Compliance: Meet legal and regulatory obligations
` }, { title: "Data Sharing & Disclosure", content: `

We do not sell your personal information. We may share data in the following circumstances:

  • Service Providers: With trusted vendors who help us operate our platform
  • Legal Requirements: When required by law or in response to legal process
  • Business Transfers: In connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets
  • With Your Consent: When you explicitly authorize us to share
` }, { title: "Data Security", content: `

We implement robust security measures to protect your data:

  • Encryption at rest using AES-256
  • Encryption in transit using TLS 1.3
  • Regular security audits and penetration testing
  • Employee background checks and security training
  • Access controls and least-privilege principles
` }, { title: "Your Rights", bgColor: "#f8fafc", content: `

You have the following rights regarding your personal data:

  • Access: Request a copy of your personal data
  • Correction: Request correction of inaccurate data
  • Deletion: Request deletion of your personal data
  • Portability: Request your data in a portable format
  • Opt-out: Unsubscribe from marketing communications

To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@cybervault.io

` }, { title: "Contact Us", content: `

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

  • Email: privacy@cybervault.io
  • Mail: CyberVault Security, Inc., 1 CyberVault Way, San Francisco, CA 94105

Last updated: February 2026

` }], color: "#6b7280" }; function Privacy() { return /*#__PURE__*/_jsxDEV(InfoPageLayout, { ...pageData }, void 0, false, { fileName: _jsxFileName, lineNumber: 107, columnNumber: 10 }, this); } _c = Privacy; export default Privacy; var _c; $RefreshReg$(_c, "Privacy");

import React from "react"; import InfoPageLayout from "./InfoPageLayout"; const pageData = { title: "Privacy Policy", subtitle: "Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your data.", sections: [ { title: "Information We Collect", content: `

Personal Information

We collect information you provide directly to us, such as:

  • Account information (name, email, company)
  • Payment information (processed securely through our payment providers)
  • Communication preferences
  • Customer support inquiries

Usage Data

We automatically collect certain information when you use our services:

  • Device information (IP address, browser type, operating system)
  • Usage patterns (features used, time spent, actions taken)
  • Security data (login attempts, suspicious activities)

Security Data

For security purposes, we collect:

  • Authentication logs
  • Access logs
  • Threat detection data
  • Incident reports
` }, { title: "How We Use Your Information", bgColor: "#f8fafc", content: `

We use the information we collect to:

  • Provide Services: Deliver, maintain, and improve our security platform
  • Authentication: Verify your identity and secure your account
  • Threat Detection: Identify and respond to security threats
  • Communication: Send you important updates, alerts, and support responses
  • Analytics: Understand how our services are used to improve user experience
  • Compliance: Meet legal and regulatory obligations
` }, { title: "Data Sharing & Disclosure", content: `

We do not sell your personal information. We may share data in the following circumstances:

  • Service Providers: With trusted vendors who help us operate our platform
  • Legal Requirements: When required by law or in response to legal process
  • Business Transfers: In connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets
  • With Your Consent: When you explicitly authorize us to share
` }, { title: "Data Security", content: `

We implement robust security measures to protect your data:

  • Encryption at rest using AES-256
  • Encryption in transit using TLS 1.3
  • Regular security audits and penetration testing
  • Employee background checks and security training
  • Access controls and least-privilege principles
` }, { title: "Your Rights", bgColor: "#f8fafc", content: `

You have the following rights regarding your personal data:

  • Access: Request a copy of your personal data
  • Correction: Request correction of inaccurate data
  • Deletion: Request deletion of your personal data
  • Portability: Request your data in a portable format
  • Opt-out: Unsubscribe from marketing communications

To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@cybervault.io

` }, { title: "Contact Us", content: `

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

  • Email: privacy@cybervault.io
  • Mail: CyberVault Security, Inc., 1 CyberVault Way, San Francisco, CA 94105

Last updated: February 2026

` } ], color: "#6b7280" }; function Privacy() { return ; } export default Privacy;
